title: Oldeania ibityensis
taxonomy: Oldeania ibityensis is a genus and species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae. This family is commonly known as the custard apple family. The Annonaceae family includes over 2,000 species of plants, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Oldeania ibityensis is one of the lesser-known species within this family. It is primarily found in Madagascar, where it grows in a variety of habitats.
